translations.en: I see a man over there.
translations.de: Ich sehe da drüben einen Mann.
translations.zh-Hans: 我看见那边有一个男人。
translations.yue: 我喺嗰邊見到一個男人。
translations.vi: Tôi thấy một người đàn ông ở đằng kia.
translations.hi: मैं वहाँ एक आदमी को देख रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg ser en mann der borte.
translations.id: Saya melihat seorang pria di sana.
translations.sv: Jag ser en man där borta.
translations.ja: あそこに男の人が見えます。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; serves as the grammatical subject of the verb 'vois'.
Main verb in the present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting 'un homme' as a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines the noun 'homme'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'vois' determined by 'un'.
Locative adverb; provides a place complement indicating where the man is (adverbial modifier of the clause).

translations.en: This man is waiting for the bus.
translations.es: Este hombre está esperando el autobús.
translations.de: Dieser Mann wartet auf den Bus.
translations.pt: Este homem está esperando o ônibus.
translations.vi: Người đàn ông này đang đợi xe buýt.
translations.nl: Deze man wacht op de bus.
translations.hu: Ez a férfi a buszra vár.
translations.hi: यह आदमी बस का इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.el: Αυτός ο άντρας περιμένει το λεωφορείο.
translations.sv: Den här mannen väntar på bussen.
translations.ja: この男性はバスを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; allomorphic form used before vowel or h muet (here before 'homme').
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb 'attend', determined by 'Cet'.
Main verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'le bus' as a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'bus' and marks a specific referent.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'attend'.

sentences.target: Un homme cherche sa clé devant la porte.
sentences.reading: /œ̃ nɔm ʃɛʁʃ sa kle dəvɑ̃ la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Un homme cherche sa clé devant la porte.
translations.ipa: /œ̃ nɔm ʃɛʁʃ sa kle dəvɑ̃ la pɔʁt/
translations.en: A man is looking for his key by the door.
translations.es: Un hombre busca su llave junto a la puerta.
translations.de: Ein Mann sucht vor der Tür nach seinem Schlüssel.
translations.it: Un uomo cerca la sua chiave vicino alla porta.
translations.ko: 한 남자가 문 앞에서 열쇠를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 一个男人在门口找他的钥匙。
translations.yue: 有個男人喺門口搵佢嘅鎖匙。
translations.ru: Мужчина ищет свой ключ у двери.
translations.pt: Um homem procura sua chave perto da porta.
translations.he: גבר מחפש את המפתח שלו ליד הדלת.
translations.tr: Bir adam kapının yanında anahtarını arıyor.
translations.vi: Một người đàn ông đang tìm chìa khóa của mình ở trước cửa.
translations.ar: رجل يبحث عن مفتاحه عند الباب.
translations.nl: Een man zoekt zijn sleutel bij de deur.
translations.uk: Чоловік шукає свій ключ біля дверей.
translations.hu: Egy férfi az ajtónál keresi a kulcsát.
translations.hi: एक आदमी दरवाज़े के पास अपनी चाबी ढूंढ रहा है.
translations.pl: Mężczyzna szuka swojego klucza przy drzwiach.
translations.el: Ένας άντρας ψάχνει το κλειδί του δίπλα στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: En mann leter etter nøkkelen sin ved døren.
translations.id: Seorang pria sedang mencari kuncinya di dekat pintu.
translations.sv: En man letar efter sin nyckel vid dörren.
translations.ro: Un bărbat își caută cheia lângă ușă.
translations.cs: Muž hledá svůj klíč u dveří.
translations.da: En mand leder efter sin nøgle ved døren.
translations.ja: 男の人がドアのそばで鍵を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines the subject noun 'homme'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'cherche'.
Main verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting 'sa clé' as a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; agrees with the feminine singular noun 'clé' and attributes possession to the subject.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'devant la porte' as a place complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: L'homme arrive maintenant à la gare.

translations.fr: L'homme arrive maintenant à la gare.
translations.en: The man is arriving at the station now.
translations.es: El hombre llega ahora a la estación.
translations.de: Der Mann kommt jetzt am Bahnhof an.
translations.ko: 그 남자가 지금 역에 도착하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个男人现在到达车站。
translations.yue: 嗰個男人而家到咗車站。
translations.pt: O homem está chegando à estação agora.
translations.vi: Người đàn ông đang đến nhà ga ngay bây giờ.
translations.nl: De man arriveert nu op het station.
translations.hu: A férfi most megérkezik az állomásra.
translations.hi: वह आदमी अभी स्टेशन पर पहुँच रहा है.
translations.el: Ο άντρας φτάνει τώρα στον σταθμό.
translations.id: Pria itu tiba di stasiun sekarang.
translations.ja: その男性は今、駅に着くところです。

tokens.explanation: Noun with elided definite article 'l'' attached (lemma of the article: 'le'); functions as the subject, masculine singular.
Intransitive main verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'L'homme'.
Temporal adverb modifying 'arrive'.
Preposition introducing the place complement 'la gare'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'gare'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'à', specifying the destination/place.
